content.headline: Pebble Beach: Play the Legend, Score in Your Glass
content.description_html:
Pebble Beach Golf Links is the course that defines California golf—a 6,316-yard masterpiece where every hole commands respect and every view stops you mid-swing. Playing it once is a pilgrimage; playing it night after night on your own terms? That's what Split the Tee makes possible.

This glass covers 9 holes of pure Pebble drama. You'll track your score as you drink, the beer level climbing and falling with each hole's result. Par 4s, par 5s, the signature par 4 at hole 10—they all live on the etched ruler markings of your glass. Finish the front or back nine, drain the glass, pass it to your friend, and watch them face the same holes under the same pressure. The course stays legendary; the stakes stay real.

Split the Tee turns a round at Pebble into a social event. Grab a set of glasses—one for each player—and suddenly you're not just reminiscing about that one trip. You're building a tradition. Friends gather, holes matter, and every drink tells the story of how you played today. Pebble Beach deserves an audience. Make yours your crew.
bullets: 18 holes, 72 par, 6,316 yards—the full Pebble experience etched into every glass
Score on the glass as you drink; the beer level IS your scorecard for 9 holes
Hole 10's signature challenge lives on your glass—every round plays the same legendary holes
One glass per player means everyone faces the course their own way, then passes the proof
Built for groups: play, drink, compare, repeat—Pebble Beach every night with your friends
